subject: Add explicit exports for Webpack 4 compatibility
after: Explicit exports for type paths plus wildcard fallback
consumerImpact: Webpack 4 consumers can now resolve @rei/cdr-tokens/types/* imports without module resolution errors

crossRepoImpact.description: Cedar v17 consumers using Webpack 4 can now upgrade successfully

migrationSteps: Upgrade to @rei/cdr-tokens v14.0.2 if using Webpack 4
No action required for modern bundlers (Vite, Webpack 5, Rollup)
